        page_entitled: "open"
    };
    if (1 == 17) {
        dataLayerEvent.article_id = typeof DMP_ArticleID !== 'undefined' ? DMP_ArticleID : "";
        dataLayerEvent.is_article_locked = typeof DMP_IsArticleLocked !== 'undefined' ? DMP_IsArticleLocked : "";
        dataLayerEvent.page_tags = typeof DMP_ArticleTags !== 'undefined' ? DMP_ArticleTags : [];
        dataLayerEvent.published_date = typeof DMP_PublishedDate !== 'undefined' ? DMP_PublishedDate : "";
        dataLayerEvent.company_mentioned_symbols = typeof DMP_CompanySymbol !== 'undefined' ? DMP_CompanySymbol : "";
    }
    if (1 == 2) {
        dataLayerEvent.company_mentioned_symbols = typeof DMP_CompanySymbol !== 'undefined' ? DMP_CompanySymbol : "";
        dataLayerEvent.company_mentioned_markets = typeof DMP_MarketName !== 'undefined' ? DMP_MarketName : "";
    }
    
    var reportID = '';
    if (reportID != null && reportID.trim() != "") {
        dataLayerEvent.report_id = reportID;
    }

    var pageEntitled = 'open';
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    var analyticsState = {
        userDataLoaded: false,
        pageDataPushed: false,
        commentsCountPushed: false,
        gtmInitialized: false
    };

    var isCommentable = 'false';
    function checkAndInitializeGTM() {
        if (analyticsState.userDataLoaded && analyticsState.pageDataPushed && !analyticsState.gtmInitialized) {
            if (1 == 17) {

                if (isCommentable == "false") {
                    analyticsState.gtmInitialized = true;
                    loadGTM();
                }
                else if (isCommentable == "true" && analyticsState.commentsCountPushed) {
                    analyticsState.gtmInitialized = true;
                    loadGTM();
                }
            }
            else {
                analyticsState.gtmInitialized = true;
                loadGTM();
            }

        }
    }
    if (pageEntitled == 'open') {
        window.dataLayer.push(dataLayerEvent);
        analyticsState.pageDataPushed = true;
    }
    window.addEventListener('packageupdated', function (event) {
        const packageName = event.detail.packageName;
        dataLayerEvent.site_version = packageName;
        window.dataLayer.push(dataLayerEvent);
        analyticsState.pageDataPushed = true;
    });
    window.addEventListener('commentCountReady', function (event) {
        const articleComments = event.detail.count;
        window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
        window.dataLayer.push({
            comment_count: articleComments
        });
        analyticsState.commentsCountPushed = true;
        checkAndInitializeGTM();
    });
    function loadAnalyticsData() {
        return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {

            var storageKey = "analyticsData_" + '';
            var cached = null;
            try {
                var cachedItem = sessionStorage.getItem(storageKey);
                if (cachedItem) {
                    cached = JSON.parse(cachedItem);
                    resolve(cached);
                    return;
                }
            } catch (e) {

            }

            $jq360.ajax({
                url: '/Users/GetUserAnalyticsData',
                timeout: 5000,
                cache: false
            }).done(function (data) {
                try {
                    sessionStorage.setItem(storageKey, JSON.stringify(data));
                } catch (e) {
                }
                resolve(data);
            }).fail(function (xhr, status, error) {
                resolve({ data: { WatchlistCount: 0, Rank: 0, CommentCount: 0, PostCount: 0 } });
            });
        });
    }

    function loadAnalyticsDataAsync() {
        setTimeout(function () {
            try {
                loadAnalyticsData().then(count => {
                    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
                    window.dataLayer.push({
                        user_watchlist_count: count.data.WatchlistCount,
                        user_rank: count.data.Rank,
                        user_comment_count: count.data.CommentCount,
                        user_posts_count: count.data.PostCount
                    });
                    analyticsState.userDataLoaded = true;
                    checkAndInitializeGTM();
                }).catch(error => {
                    analyticsState.userDataLoaded = true;
                    checkAndInitializeGTM();
                });
            } catch (error) {
            }
        }, 0);
    }

    function initAnalytics() {
        //if (document.readyState === 'complete') {
        //    loadAnalyticsDataAsync();
        //} else {
        //    window.addEventListener('load', loadAnalyticsDataAsync);
        //}
        loadAnalyticsDataAsync();
    }

    initAnalytics();
    checkAndInitializeGTM();
</script>

<script>
    $(document).click(function (event) {
        if (!$(event.target).parents('#ddlCompanyContainer').length > 0) {
            $('#divCompanyDropDown').hide();
            $('.Labelssearch_main').show();
        }
    });

    $("#searchInputMain").click(function () {
        if ($('#divCompanyDropDown').css('display') == 'none') {
            $('#divCompanyDropDown').css('display', 'block');
        }
        else {
            $('#divCompanyDropDown').css('display', 'none');
        }
        $(".sectorfilterremove_main").removeAttr("style")
        $(".Labelssearch_main").removeAttr("style")
        $("[id^=market_]").removeClass("open").addClass("closed")
        $("[id^=market_companies_]").removeClass("open").addClass("closed")
        if ($(".country-name").length == 0) {
            $("[id^=market_companies_]").removeClass("closed").addClass("open")
        }
    })

    function ToggleMarket(mid) {
        if ($("#market_companies_" + mid + " ul >li:visible").length > 0) {
            var pmid = $("[relmarkettoggled]").attr("relmarkettoggled");
            if (pmid != mid) {
                if (!$("#market_" + mid).hasClass("open") && $("#market_" + pmid).hasClass("open")) {
                    $("#market_" + pmid).switchClass("open", "closed");
                    $("#market_companies_" + pmid).switchClass("open", "closed");
                }
            }
            $("[relmarkettoggled]").attr("relmarkettoggled", mid);
            $(".sectorfilterremove_main:visible").removeAttr("style")
            if ($("#market_" + mid).hasClass("closed")) {
                $("#market_" + mid).switchClass("closed", "open");
                $("#market_companies_" + mid).switchClass("closed", "open");
            } else {
                $("#market_" + mid).switchClass("open", "closed");
                $("#market_companies_" + mid).switchClass("open", "closed");
            }
        }
    };

    function mainfilterreportcompany() {

        var input, filter = "", checkbox, spans;

        if ($("#searchInputMain").length > 0) {
            $('#divCompanyDropDown').css('display', 'block');
        }
        else {
            $('#divCompanyDropDown').css('display', 'none');
        }
        if ($('#searchInputMain').val() != "") {
            input = document.getElementById("searchInputMain");
            filter = input.value.toUpperCase();
        }
        div = document.getElementById("divCompanyDropDown");
        checkbox = div.getElementsByClassName("searchingElements");
        spans = div.getElementsByClassName("sectorfilterremove_main");
        if (filter.length > 0) {
            $(".Labelssearch_main").css("display", "none");
            $(".sectorfilterremove_main").css("display", "none");

        }
        else {
            $(".Labelssearch_main").css("display", "block");
            $(".sectorfilterremove_main").css("display", "block");
            $(".sectorfilterremove_main").removeAttr("style")
            $("[id^=market_]").removeClass("open").addClass("closed")
            $("[id^=market_companies_]").removeClass("open").addClass("closed")
            return false;
        }

        filter = filter.replace(/\ا/g, 'أ').replace(/\أ/g, 'ا').replace(/\ى/g, 'ي').replace(/\ه/g, 'ة').replace(/\ا/g, 'آ').replace(/\عِ/g, 'ع').replace(/\آ/g, 'ا').replace(/\إ/g, 'ا').replace(/\أ/g, 'آ');
        var market = "";
        for (i = 0; i < checkbox.length; i++) {
            txtValue = checkbox[i].getAttribute('relf-companyname');
            txtValue = txtValue.replace(/\ا/g, 'أ').replace(/\أ/g, 'ا').replace(/\ى/g, 'ي').replace(/\ه/g, 'ة').replace(/\ا/g, 'آ').replace(/\عِ/g, 'ع').replace(/\آ/g, 'ا').replace(/\إ/g, 'ا').replace(/\أ/g, 'آ');
            StockSymbol = checkbox[i].getAttribute('relf-Stocksymbol');
            if ((txtValue && txtValue.toUpperCase().indexOf(filter) > -1) || (StockSymbol && StockSymbol.toUpperCase().indexOf(filter) > -1)) {
                var li = $(checkbox[i]).parents('li')
                market = li.attr("data-market");
                li.css('display', "block");
                li.parent("ul").prev("span").css("display", "block")
                $("[id*='market_']").removeClass("closed").addClass("open")
                $("[id*='market_companies_']").removeClass("closed").addClass("open")
            }
        }
    }

    $('body').on('click', function (e) {
        $('#searchInputMain').val("");
    });
</script>                                                <!--navigation end here-->

<script type="text/javascript">
    var currentElem = undefined;
    function onMenuNavHover(ele) {
        $(".fl-menu").each(function () {
            $(this).removeClass("sfCustomHover");
            $(this).find(".holder-full").hide();
            $(this).removeAttr("active-item");
            $("#nav li.current ul.holder-full").show();
            $("#nav li.current ul.holder-full").css("visibility", "");
        });
        if (!$(ele).hasClass("current")) {
            $(ele).addClass("sfCustomHover");
            $(ele).find(".holder-full").show();
            $(ele).attr("active-item", "true");
        }
        else {
            $(ele).find(".holder-full").show();

        }
        return false;
        }

        function onSubMenuNavHover(ele) {
            return false;
        }



        if (/Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent)) {
            $(".fl-menu").click(function () {
                alert("asas");
                $(this).addClass("sfCustomHover");
                if ($(".fl-menu").hasClass("sfCustomHover")) {
                    $(this).addClass("sfCustomHover");
                    $(this).children("ul").addClass("openMenu");
                }

            });



            $('.content').click(function () {
                $(this).removeClass("sfCustomHover");
                $(this).children("ul").removeClass("openMenu");
            });
            $(document).mouseup(function (e) {
                var container = $(".fl-menu");

                // If the target of the click isn't the container
                if (!container.is(e.target) && container.has(e.target).length === 0) {
                    //container.hide();
                    $(".fl-menu").removeClass("sfCustomHover");
                    $(".fl-menu").children("ul").hide();

                }
            });



        }


        function onMenuOnBlur() {
            $(".fl-menu").each(function () {
                if (!$(this).hasClass("current")) {
                    $(this).removeClass("sfCustomHover");
                    $(this).find(".holder-full").hide();
                    $(this).removeAttr("active-item");
                }
            });
            $("#nav li.current ul.holder-full").show();
            $("#nav li.current ul.holder-full").css("visibility", "");
            return false;
        }


        function onMenuOnBlurnew() {
            $(".fl-menu").each(function () {
                if (!$(this).hasClass("current")) {
                    $(this).removeClass("sfCustomHover");
                    $(this).find(".holder-full").hide();
                    $(this).removeAttr("active-item");
                }
            });
            $("#nav li.current ul.holder-full").show();
            $("#nav li.current ul.holder-full").css("visibility", "");
            return false;
        }
        function onMenuOnBlurnew() {
            return false;
        };


    $(document).ready(function () {
        if ($('ul#nav').find('li.current').length == 0 && 'true' == 'false' && ($('ul#ul-popularmenu').length == 0 || $('#ul-popularmenu .argaamtool').length == 1)) {
            $('#argaam-container').removeClass("subMenuOpen")
        }
        $('body').click(function (e) {
         //   onMenuOnBlur();
            onMenuOnBlurnew();
        });
        $('.fl-menu.current').find('ul').show();

        let myDiv = document.getElementById("nav");
        let mySelect = document.getElementById("navigateByYear");
        let mySelec = document.getElementById("navigateByMonth");
        myDiv.addEventListener("mouseenter", function (event) {
            if (mySelect != null) mySelect.blur();
        }, false);
        myDiv.addEventListener("mouseenter", function (event) {
            if (mySelec != null) mySelec.blur();
        }, false);





    });
</script>

        <div class="calEvNav">
            <button class="btnCalendarEvent_Next_c"><span class="glyphicon glyphicon-forward" aria-hidden="true"></span></button>
            <button class="btn_stop_c"><span class="glyphicon glyphicon-pause" aria-hidden="true"></span></button>
            <button class="btnCalendarEvent_Previous_c"><span class="glyphicon glyphicon-backward" aria-hidden="true"></span></button>

<script type="text/javascript">
        
    $(document).ready(function () {
            $(".calanderticker").on('click', function () {

                if ($(".date-drop-down").is(":visible")) {
                    $(".date-drop-down").hide();
                }
                else
                    $(".date-drop-down").show();
            });

        $(".btnCalendarEvent_Next_c").click(function () {
            if (eventsTicker != undefined && eventsTicker.webTicker != undefined) {
                eventsTicker.webTicker('increase');
                if ($('.btn_stop_c').children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-play')) {
                    $('.btn_stop_c').children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-play').addClass('glyphicon-pause');

                }
            }

        });

        $(".btnCalendarEvent_Previous_c").click(function () {
            if (eventsTicker != undefined && eventsTicker.webTicker != undefined) {
                eventsTicker.webTicker('decrease');
                if ($('.btn_stop_c').children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-play')) {
                    $('.btn_stop_c').children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-play').addClass('glyphicon-pause');

                }
            }

        });

        $('.btn_stop_c').click(function (event) {

            if (eventsTicker != undefined && eventsTicker.webTicker != undefined) {
                if ($(this).children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-pause')) {
                    $(this).children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-pause').addClass('glyphicon-play');
                    eventsTicker.webTicker('stop');
                }
                else if ($(this).children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-play')) {
                    $(this).children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-play').addClass('glyphicon-pause');
                    eventsTicker.webTicker('cont');
                }
            }


        });
        });
         function getCalendar(day) {
         
        var showWeekly = day == undefined || day == null || day == 1 ? false : true;
        var url = `/ar/calendar/ticker?weekly=${showWeekly}`;
    var jqxhr = $.ajax({
        type: "get",
        url: url
    })
        .done(function (data) {
            if (data != null) {
                $("#tickerData").hide();
                $("#uCalEv").empty();
                $("#uCalEv").html(data);
                $(".date-drop-down").hide();
              applyWebTicker("#calEvTicker");
            }
        });
    }
        function CalendarEventTickerDetail(item) {

            $("#calendarEventDetail").html("");
            var calendarEventID = $(item).attr("data-eventid");
            var url = "/ar/calendar/calendardetail/" + calendarEventID + "?isEventTicker=true";
            var jqxhr = $.ajax({
                type: "get",
                url: url
            })
             .done(function (data) {
                 $("#calendarEventTickerDetail").html(data);
                 $("#colse-rpojects").click(function () {
                     $("#calendarEventTickerDetail").html("");
                     return false;
                 });
             });
        }
</script>

</div>

<script>
    var favComapyIds = [];
    var favComapytabId = 0;
    var defaultGroup = -1;
    $(document).ready(function (event) {

        if (0 == 0 || 0 !=  $("#active-tab-group-id").val()) {
            favComapyIds = [];
        }
        else
        {
            getMyFavCompanies(null, true);
        }
        if ('True' == 'True') {

            var lastTab = $("#active-tab-by-time").val();// getSessionData();//

                lastTab = lastTab != undefined && lastTab != null ? lastTab : '1';
                switch (lastTab) {
                    case '1':
                        $("#get-all-by-volume").click();
                        break;
                    case '3':
                    $("#commodity_data").click();
                        break;
                    case '2':
                    $("#intl_data").click();
                        break;
                    case '4':
                        setTimeout(function () {
                            $("#calendar_data").click();
                        }, 500);

                        break;
                    case '5':
                        if ('False' == 'True') {
                            //$("#active-fav-group").val(-1);
                            $("#default-group").click();
                        }
                        else {
                            $("#get-all-by-volume").click();
                        }
                        break;
                    case '6':
                        if ('False' == 'True') {
                            $("#future_data").click();
                        }
                        else {
                            $("#get-all-by-volume").click();
                        }


                }
            }
            else {
            $("#calendar_data").click();
            $(".calEvs").css("display", "block");
            $(".date-drop-down").hide();
                applyWebTicker("#calEvTicker");

            }
            if ($(".market-stats-dropdown").is(":visible")) {
            $(".market-stats-dropdown").hide();
            }

        $(".selected-stat,.drp_Arrow").on('click', function () {

                if ($(".market-stats-dropdown").is(":visible")) {
                $(".market-stats-dropdown").hide();
                }
            else {
                $(".market-stats-dropdown").hide();
                $('.market-selectors.active .market-stats-dropdown').show()
            }
        });
        $(".ticker_box").fadeIn();
       // $('.btnCalendarEvent_Next').click();
        });

     function addToFavTab(tabID) {
        window.localStorage.setItem('my-fav-tab', tabID)
     }
    function getSessionData() {
        var favTab = window.localStorage.getItem('my-fav-tab');
        return favTab;
    }
    function showCalender(el) {
        //addToFavTab(4);
        if (el != undefined && el != null) {
             $(".ticker-feed").removeClass("active");
             $(el).parent().addClass("active");
        }
        $("#trading-note").hide();
        $("#tickerData").hide();
        $("#uCalEv").show();
            applyWebTicker('#calEvTicker');
        $(".date-drop-down").hide();
        $("#aggregateddata").hide();
        //$(".tickercontainer").addClass('full');
        $('.market-stats').hide();
        $(".calEvNav").show();
    }
    function showDropDown() {
        $(".user-group-dropdown").toggle();
    }

    function getMarketStatsData(el, type, selected_market_id, showOnload, showFav) {
        var sub_type = type;
        if ('False' == 'True' && (showFav == undefined || showFav == false)) {
            $("#trading-note").text('البيانات متأخرة 5 دقائق');
            $("#trading-note").show();
        }
        else {
            if (showFav != undefined && showFav == true && type != undefined) {
                sub_type = $("#active-fav-group").val() == -1 ? -1 : type;
                type = type == -1 ? 0 : type;
                $("#active-fav-group").val(type);
                $(".user-group-dropdown").hide();
                defaultGroup = sub_type;

            }
            $("#trading-note").hide();
        }

        var marketId = selected_market_id != null ? selected_market_id : $("#active-market-id").val();

        if (selected_market_id != null && el != undefined && el != null && (showFav == undefined || showFav == false)) {
            $("#active-market-id").val(marketId);
            $(".ticker-feed").removeClass("active");
            $(el).parent().addClass("active");
            var str = 'أكبر 20 شركة';
            if (str != undefined && str.length > 13 && '1' == '2') {
                var text = str.substring(0, str.length - 6);
                var st2 = text + "...";
                $(".selected-stat").text(st2);
            }
            else {
                $(".selected-stat").text(str);
            }

            //$(".market-stats").show();
            $(el).siblings('.market-stats').show();
            $(el).parents('.market-stats').show();

            $(el).parents('.ticker-feed').addClass('active');
            $(".market-stats-dropdown").hide();
            $(el).parents('.market-stats-dropdown').hide();
            $('.aggregated-li').hide();
            $(".aggregated-li[relf-aggregated='" + marketId + "']").show();
        }
        else if (showFav != undefined && showFav == true) {
            $(".ticker-feed").removeClass("active");
            $(el).parents('.ticker-feed').addClass('active');
            $(".market-stats-dropdown").hide();
            $(el).parents('.market-stats-dropdown').hide();

            $("#aggregateddata").hide();
            $(".tickercontainer ").addClass('full');
        }
        var tickerId = (showFav == undefined || showFav == false) ? 1 : 7;
        
        var url = `/ar/partial-ticker-data/${tickerId}?marketTickerType=${sub_type}&marketId=${marketId}`;
    var jqxhr = $.ajax({
        type: "get",
        url: url
    })
        .done(function (data) {
            $(".calEvNav").show();
            setTimeout(function () { });
            $("#market-company-ticker-div").html(data);
            $(".market-stats-dropdown").hide();
            $("#tickerData").show();
            $("#uCalEv").hide();

                applyWebTicker('#market-company-ticker');
            if (showFav != undefined && showFav == true) {

                $("#aggregateddata").hide();
                $(".tickercontainer ").addClass('full');
            }
            else {
                $("#aggregateddata").show();
            }


            if (selected_market_id == null) {
                  var str =$(el).text();
                if (str != undefined && str.length > 13 && '1' == '2') {
                    var text = str.substring(0, str.length - 6);
                    var st2 = text + "...";
                    $(".selected-stat").text(st2);
                }
                else {
                      $(".selected-stat").text(str);
                }
            }

            if (showFav == undefined || showFav == false) {
                setTimeout(function () {

                    $("#market-company-ticker li").each(function (i, v) {
                        if ($(v).attr('ld-name') != undefined && ($(v).attr('ld-name') != ''
                            && favComapyIds.indexOf(parseInt($(v).attr('ld-name'))) != -1)) {
                            if ($(v).children('.com-plus-icon').length > 0) {
                                $(v).find('.com-plus-icon').removeClass('com-plus-icon').addClass('com-minus-icon');
                                $(v).find('.com-plus-icon').attr("title", "");
                                $(v).find('.com-minus-icon').attr("title", 'حذف الشركة من قائمة شركاتي');
                            }
                        }


                    });
                }, 500);
            }
            else if (showFav == true) {
                favComapyIds = [];
                $("#market-company-ticker li").each(function (i, v) {
                    if ($(v).attr('ld-name') != undefined && $(v).attr('ld-name') != '' ) {

                        favComapyIds.push(parseInt($(v).attr('ld-name')))
                    }
                });
            }


            if (showOnload) {
                $("#tickerData").hide();
                $("#uCalEv").show();
            }

            $("#ticker-live-feed").attr("ld-channel", "Companies");

            loadTicker("Companies","webticker");

        });
    }
     function getOtherMarketsData(el,tickerId) {
         if (el != undefined && el != null) {
             $(".ticker-feed").removeClass("active");
             $(el).parent().addClass("active");
            //addToFavTab($(el).parent().attr("relf-tab-id"));
         }
        var marketId = $("#active-market-id").val();
        // $('#market-company-ticker-div').empty();

        var url = `/ar/partial-ticker-data/${tickerId}`;
    var jqxhr = $.ajax({
        type: "get",
        url: url
    })
        .done(function (data) {
            $(".calEvNav").show();
            $("#market-company-ticker-div").html(data);
            $(".market-stats-dropdown").hide();
            $("#tickerData").show();
            $("#uCalEv").hide();
            var channel = "";
            if (tickerId != 4) {
                applyWebTicker('#market-company-ticker');
            }
            if (tickerId == 3) {
                if ('True' == 'True') {
                    $("#trading-note").text('البيانات لحظية');
                    $("#trading-note").show();
                }
                else {
                    $("#trading-note").hide();
                }
                $("#ticker-live-feed").attr("ld-channel", "commodities");
                channel = "commodities";
            }
            else if (tickerId == 2) {
                $("#ticker-live-feed").attr("ld-channel", "intl-indices");
                if ('True' == 'True') {
                    $("#trading-note").text('البيانات لحظية');
                    $("#trading-note").show();
                }
                else {
                    $("#trading-note").hide();
                }
                channel = "intl-indices";
            }
            if (tickerId == 4) {
                $("#trading-note").hide();
                if ('False' == 'True') {
                    $("#trading-note").show();
                }
                $(".calEvNav").hide();
            }
            $("#aggregateddata").hide();
            $(".tickercontainer ").addClass('full');
            $(".market-stats").hide();
            $('.market-selectors.active .market-stats').show();
            if (tickerId == 4) {

                $(".calEvs").show();
                $("#market-company-ticker-div").show();
            }
            else {
                loadTicker(channel, "webticker");
            }

        });
}
    function getMyFavCompanies(el, showAll) {

        
        var url = `/ar/watchlist/get-my-companies`;
    var jqxhr = $.ajax({
        type: "get",
        url: url
    })
        .done(function (data) {
            if (data != null) {
                if (showAll) {
                    favComapyIds = data.CompanyIds;
                }
            }
        });
    }
    function addToMyFavCompanies(el, companyId) {
        if ($(el).hasClass('com-minus-icon')) {
            return removeFromFavCompanies(el, companyId);
        }
        if (favComapyIds.indexOf(companyId) != -1) {
            //$(el).remove();
            return;
        }
        var marketId = $("#active-market-id").val();
        $(el).removeClass('com-plus-icon').addClass('com-minus-icon').attr("title",'حذف الشركة من قائمة شركاتي');
        var activeGroupId = $("#active-fav-group").val();
        var url = `/ar/watchlist/add-my-companies/${marketId}/${companyId}?activeGroupId=${activeGroupId}`;


    var jqxhr = $.ajax({
        type: "get",
        url: url
    })
        .done(function () {
            favComapyIds.push(companyId);
        });
    }
    function removeFromFavCompanies(el, companyId) {
        if (favComapyIds.indexOf(companyId) == -1) {
            //$(el).remove();
            return;
        }
        var marketId = $("#active-market-id").val();
        $(el).removeClass('com-minus-icon').addClass('com-plus-icon').attr("title",'أضف لشركاتي');
        var activeGroupId = defaultGroup;
        var url = `/ar/watchlist/remove-fav-companies/${companyId}?groupId=${activeGroupId}`;


    var jqxhr = $.ajax({
        type: "get",
        url: url
    })
        .done(function () {
            var index = favComapyIds.indexOf(companyId);
            if (index > -1) {
                favComapyIds.splice(index, 1);
            }

        });
    }


</script>


<script type="text/javascript">
        var eventsTicker;
        function applyWebTicker(tickerName) {
            $(".calEvs").css("display", "block");
            eventsTicker = $(tickerName).webTicker({
                direction: 'right',
                duplicate: true
            });
            // $(".calEvNav").click();
            eventsTicker.webTicker('stop');
            setTimeout(function () {
                eventsTicker.webTicker('cont');
            },500);

            if ($('.btn_stop').children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-play')) {
                $('.btn_stop').children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-play').addClass('glyphicon-pause');

            }
        }

    $('#market-company-ticker li div a').click(function (event) {
            event.stopPropagation();
        });
    $(".btnCalendarEvent_Next").click(function () {
        if (eventsTicker != undefined && eventsTicker.webTicker != undefined) {
            eventsTicker.webTicker('increase');
            if ($('.btn_stop').children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-play')) {
                $('.btn_stop').children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-play').addClass('glyphicon-pause');

            }
         }

        });

    $(".btnCalendarEvent_Previous").click(function () {
        if (eventsTicker != undefined && eventsTicker.webTicker != undefined) {
            eventsTicker.webTicker('decrease');
            if ($('.btn_stop').children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-play')) {
                $('.btn_stop').children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-play').addClass('glyphicon-pause');

            }
        }

        });

    $('.btn_stop').click(function (event) {

        if (eventsTicker != undefined && eventsTicker.webTicker != undefined) {
            if ($(this).children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-pause')) {
                $(this).children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-pause').addClass('glyphicon-play');
                eventsTicker.webTicker('stop');
            }
            else if ($(this).children('.glyphicon').hasClass('glyphicon-play')) {
                $(this).children('.glyphicon').removeClass('glyphicon-play').addClass('glyphicon-pause');
                eventsTicker.webTicker('cont');
            }
        }


    });


</script>

    $(document).ready(function () {
        /*$("#ratios_summary_widget_market_id_14").hide();*/
        if ('True' == "True" || 'False' == "True") {
            document.getElementById('priceEarnings').click();
        }
        else if ('True' != "True") {
            document.getElementById('priceEarnings').click();
        }
        else {
            document.getElementById('otherTabs').click();
        }

        RatiosSummaryWidget();

        $("#priceEarnings_14").click(function () {
            var mdi = 14;
            var pe = $('#priceEarnings_14').val();
            if (true || mdi == 14 && pe == 14) {
                LoadTabs(this, '/ar/financialratios/financialpriceearningsummarypartial/1/priceearnings/annual/14')
            }
        })
    });

	var dateColIndex = 0;
	var moreColIndex = 7;
	$(document).ready(function () {
			ReverseTableDirection('mergersListingTable');
			dateColIndex = 7;
			moreColIndex = 0;
		if ('true' == 'false') {
			ApplyDataTable();
		}

	});

	function ApplyDataTable() {
		maDataTables = $('#mergersListingTable').DataTable({

			"searching": false,
			"paging": true,
			"columnDefs": [
                   { "orderable": false, "targets": [moreColIndex] }

			"lengthChange": true,

				"sZeroRecords": "لا تتوفر بيانات حاليا",
				"sInfo": "إظهار _START_ إلى _END_ من أصل _TOTAL_ مدخل",

					"sFirst": "الأول",
					"sPrevious": "السابق",

				}
			},

		});
	}

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {
        if ($(location).attr('href').split('/').length > 4) {
            $('#mostCommentedTabHome').hide();

            $('#mostCommentedHome').hide();
            $('#mostcommentedarticlesection').hide();
            $('#MostComViewTabContainerHome').hide()
            $('#mostCommentedTabHome').css('display', 'none')
            $('.nav-tabs-accord').hide();
        }
        
    });
   
    function loadMostCommented() {
        var strValue = '';
        $("[rel_count_rec_most]").each(function (i, e) {
            strValue = strValue + $(e).attr("rel_count_rec_most") + ':' + $(e).attr("rel_type") + '|';
        });
        if (strValue == '')
            return;
        $.ajax({
            type: "POST",
            url: streamerApiURL + "/json/streamer-home/get-comments-count",
            data: { Values: strValue },
            success: function (data) {
                var lcldta = getGreyData();
                $(data.Data).each(function (i, r) {
                    if ($.isNumeric(r.CommentsCount) && parseInt(r.CommentsCount) != 0) {
                        var clr = r.IsRedColor ? clr = "red1" : "grey";
                        if (lcldta.length > 0 && lcldta.filter((dta) => dta.Eid == r.EntityID && dta.Tid == r.ThreadID).length > 0) {
                            clr = "grey";
                        }
                        var ele = $("[rel_count_rec_most='" + r.RecordID + "']")
                        ele.attr("href", ele.attr("href") + "#" + r.ThreadID);
                        //ele.parent().children("a").attr("href", "return addCmntColor(" + r.Eid + "," + r.ThreadID + "," + r.CreatedOn + ")")
                        // var content = "<a href=" + ele.parent().children("a").attr("href") + "#" + r.ThreadID + ">" + r.CommentsCount + "</a>";
                      
                        ele.html(r.CommentsCount).addClass("countview").addClass(clr);
                    }
                });
            }
        });
    }
    function getGreyData() {
        var currentDate = new Date();
        currentDate.setHours(currentDate.getHours() - 1);
        var data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("greyColor"));
        data = data.length > 0 ? data.filter(v => new Date(parseInt(v.dt.substr(6))) > currentDate) : data;
        localStorage.setItem("greyColor", JSON.stringify(data));
        return data;
    }
    loadMostCommented();
</script>


        </div>
    </div>
</div>

    <script>


             function LoadHomeMCVArticles() {

                $("#mostviewed_page").find(".h2hold.bbb2px").hide(); //Hide headings
                $("#mostcommented_page").find(".h2hold.bbb2px").hide(); //Hide headings
				if ($("#mostcommented_page").length > 0) {
					$("#mostCommentedTabHome").addClass("active");
                    $("#mostCommentedTabHome").show();
                    $("#mostCommentedHome").show();
                }
                else if ($("#mostviewed_page").length > 0) {
					$("#mostViewedTabHome").addClass("active");
                    $("#mostViewedTabHome").show();
                    $("#mostViewedHome").show();
                }
				if ($("#mostviewed_page").length > 0) {
					$("#mostViewedTabHome").show();
                 }
                if ($("#mostcommented_page").length == 0) {
                     $("#mostCommentedTabHome").hide();
                 }
                if ($("#mostviewed_page").length != 0 || $("#mostcommented_page").length != 0) {
                    $("#MostComViewTabContainerHome").show();
                 }
                
                 $('[data-target=".SectionTabM_1358_ho-mobile-mostcommentedarticle-ar"]').hide();
                 $('[data-target=".SectionTabM_1354_ho-mobile-mostcommentedarticle-en"]').hide();
            }

           function mostCommentedTabAction() {

            $("#mostcommented_page").find(".h2hold.bbb2px").hide();
                $("#mostViewedHome").hide(); $("#mostViewedTabHome").removeClass("active"); $("#mostCommentedTabHome").addClass("active"); $("#mostCommentedHome").show();
            }
            function mostViwedTabAction()
            { $("#mostViewedHome").show(); $("#mostViewedTabHome").addClass("active"); $("#mostCommentedTabHome").removeClass("active"); $("#mostCommentedHome").hide(); }

            $(document).ready(function(){
              var jqxhr = $.ajax("/ar/articles/most-commented-articles/3")
                               .done(function (data) {
                                   $("#mostcommentedarticlesection").html(data);
                                   LoadHomeMCVArticles();
                               })
                              .fail(function (XMLHttpRequest, textStatus, errorThrown) {
                                  LoadHomeMCVArticles();
                                  console.log(textStatus);
                                  console.log(errorThrown);
                              })
                              .always(function () { 
                              });   
            });

    </script>

    function DrawSelectedIndexChart(period, indexingLogicID) {

        var updatedHref = moreUrls[1];
        document.getElementById("indexmorelink").href = updatedHref;
        //const liElements = document.querySelectorAll('#market-commodities-data li');
        //liElements.forEach((li) => {
        //    li.classList.remove('active');
        //});
        //event.classList.add('active');

        //const chartTab = document.querySelectorAll('#chrtTab');
        //var firstTabLink = chartTab[2];
        //chartTab.forEach((li) => {
        //    li.classList.remove('active');
        //});

        //firstTabLink.classList.add('active');


        var jsArray = [{"IndexingLogicID":1,"IndexingLogicName":"Argaam Saudi Equity Funds Index","IndexingLogicNameAr":"مؤشر أرقام لصناديق الأسهم السعودية","IndexingLogicQuery":"F.FundClassificationID=25 And f.CountryID=123","DaysInterval":"7"}];

        jsArray.forEach(function (element) {
            const RecentAvailableDate = FundsIndicesData1
                .filter(x => x.IndexingLogicID == 1)
                .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.ValueDate) - new Date(a.ValueDate))
                .map(x => x.ValueDate)
                .shift();

        const fromDate = new Date(RecentAvailableDate);
        const difference = '6M';
        const sixmonDate = getPreviousDate(fromDate, difference);

        var sixMonthDataList = FundsIndicesData1.filter((rec) => rec.ValueDate >= sixmonDate && rec.IndexingLogicID == 1).sort(function (a, b) {
            return new Date(a.ValueDate) - new Date(b.ValueDate);
        }).map(function (x) {
            return x.IndexVal;
        });



        //jsArray.forEach(function(element) {
        //    var sixMonthDataList = FundsIndicesData1.filter((rec) => rec.ValueDate >= sixmonDate && rec.IndexingLogicID == element.IndexingLogicID).sort(function (a, b) {
        //        return new Date(a.ValueDate) - new Date(b.ValueDate);
        //    }).map(function (x) {
        //        return x.IndexVal;
        //    });;
        var clsName = "";
        var sixMonthCurrentValue = sixMonthDataList[sixMonthDataList.length - 1];
        var sixMonthPreviousValue = sixMonthDataList[0];
        var sixMonthChange = (sixMonthCurrentValue - sixMonthPreviousValue) / sixMonthPreviousValue;
        var sixMonthChangePercentage = ((sixMonthCurrentValue - sixMonthPreviousValue) / sixMonthPreviousValue) * 100;
        if (sixMonthChange > 0) {
            clsName = "green";
        }
        else if (sixMonthChange < 0) {
            clsName = "red";
        }

        //$('#IndexCurrentValue_' + element.IndexingLogicID).classList.removeClass();
        //$('#IndexCurrentValue_' + element.IndexingLogicID).classList.removeClass();


            $('#IndexCurrentValue_' + element.IndexingLogicID).text(Number(sixMonthCurrentValue.toFixed(2)).toLocaleString());

            $('#IndexChangeValue_' + element.IndexingLogicID).parent('span').removeClass().addClass(clsName);
            $('#IndexChangeValue_' + element.IndexingLogicID).text(formatValues(sixMonthChange, 0));
            $('#IndexChangePercentageValue_' + element.IndexingLogicID).parent('span').removeClass().addClass(clsName);
            $('#IndexChangePercentageValue_' + element.IndexingLogicID).text(formatValues(sixMonthChangePercentage, 1, 'change'));

            var FundsIndexesChangePercentages = [{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"1M","ChangePercentage":-6.6724039679483466323250025200},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"3M","ChangePercentage":-3.5736427591771780441668936600},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"6M","ChangePercentage":-4.5367538139980481010465652300},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"1Y","ChangePercentage":-11.939706597325115405365417680},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"2Y","ChangePercentage":-14.789964252315823738089852310},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"3Y","ChangePercentage":20.793317616824007428807894160},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"5Y","ChangePercentage":71.069993988467237406046544510},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"YTD","ChangePercentage":-2.6327476538887344006712504800},{"IndexingLogicID":1,"Interval":"ALL","ChangePercentage":295.3811100}];
            const OneMonChangePercentage = FundsIndexesChangePercentages.find(x => x.IndexingLogicID === indexingLogicID && x.Interval === "1M")?.ChangePercentage;
            const ThreeMonChangePercentage = FundsIndexesChangePercentages.find(x => x.IndexingLogicID === indexingLogicID && x.Interval === "3M")?.ChangePercentage;
            const TwelveMonChangePercentage = FundsIndexesChangePercentages.find(x => x.IndexingLogicID === indexingLogicID && x.Interval === "1Y")?.ChangePercentage;
            const ThreeYrChangePercentage = FundsIndexesChangePercentages.find(x => x.IndexingLogicID === indexingLogicID && x.Interval === "3Y")?.ChangePercentage;
            const FiveYrChangePercentage = FundsIndexesChangePercentages.find(x => x.IndexingLogicID === indexingLogicID && x.Interval === "5Y")?.ChangePercentage;
            const YTDChangePercentage = FundsIndexesChangePercentages.find(x => x.IndexingLogicID === indexingLogicID && x.Interval === "YTD")?.ChangePercentage;

            const OneMonChangePercentageClass = OneMonChangePercentage > 0 ? "green" : "red";
            const ThreeMonChangePercentageClass = ThreeMonChangePercentage > 0 ? "green" : "red";
            const TvelveMonChangePercentageClass = TwelveMonChangePercentage > 0 ? "green" : "red";
            const ThreeYrChangePercentageClass = ThreeYrChangePercentage > 0 ? "green" : "red";
            const FiveYrChangePercentageClass = FiveYrChangePercentage > 0 ? "green" : "red";
            const YTDChangePercentageClass = YTDChangePercentage > 0 ? "green" : "red";

            $('#1MChangePer').text(formatValues(OneMonChangePercentage, 1));
            $('#1MChangePer').removeClass().addClass(OneMonChangePercentageClass);
            $('#3MChangePer').text(formatValues(ThreeMonChangePercentage, 1));
            $('#3MChangePer').removeClass().addClass(ThreeMonChangePercentageClass);
            $('#1YChangePer').text(formatValues(TwelveMonChangePercentage, 1));
            $('#1YChangePer').removeClass().addClass(TvelveMonChangePercentageClass);
            $('#3YChangePer').text(formatValues(ThreeYrChangePercentage, 1,'3Y'));
            $('#3YChangePer').removeClass().addClass(ThreeYrChangePercentageClass);
            $('#5YChangePer').text(formatValues(FiveYrChangePercentage, 1, '5Y'));
            $('#5YChangePer').removeClass().addClass(FiveYrChangePercentageClass);
            $('#YTDChangePer').text(formatValues(YTDChangePercentage, 1, 'YTD'));
            $('#YTDChangePer').removeClass().addClass(YTDChangePercentageClass);
});



        DrawFundsIndicesChartData(period, indexingLogicID);
    }

    function DrawFundsIndicesChartData(period, indexLogicID) {
        var datachart = FundsIndicesData1.filter(x => x.IndexingLogicID == indexLogicID);
        if (days !== "-1") {
            const RecentAvailableDate = datachart
                .map(x => x.ValueDate)
                .pop();
            const fromDate = new Date(RecentAvailableDate);
            const selectedIntervalDateRange = getPreviousDate(fromDate, period);
            datachart = datachart.filter(x => x.ValueDate >= selectedIntervalDateRange);

            jQuery.each(datachart, function (i, val) {
                val.IndexVal = Math.ceil(val.IndexVal * 100) / 100;
            });
        }
        var FunsIndicesChart = new AmCharts.AmSerialChart();
        FunsIndicesChart.pathToImages = "/Scripts/amcharts/images/";
        FunsIndicesChart.dataProvider = datachart;
        FunsIndicesChart.categoryField = "ValueDate";
        /*FunsIndicesChart.dateFormats = [{ period: 'fff', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'ss', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'mm', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'hh', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'DD', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'WW', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'MM', format: 'MMM' }, { period: 'YYYY', format: 'YYYY' }];*/
        FunsIndicesChart.dateFormats = [{ period: 'fff', format: 'JJ:NN:SS' }, { period: 'ss', format: 'JJ:NN:SS' }, { period: 'mm', format: 'JJ:NN' }, { period: 'hh', format: 'JJ:NN' }, { period: 'DD', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'WW', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'MM', format: 'MMM' }, { period: 'YYYY', format: 'YYYY' }];
        var categoryAxis = FunsIndicesChart.categoryAxis;
        categoryAxis.parseDates = true;
        categoryAxis.minPeriod = "DD";
        //categoryAxis.showLastLabel = true;
        //categoryAxis.showFirstLabel = true;
        categoryAxis.equalSpacing = false;
        categoryAxis.gridPosition = "start";
        /*categoryAxis.dateFormats = [{ period: 'fff', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'ss', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'mm', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'hh', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'DD', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'WW', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'MM', format: 'MMM' }, { period: 'YYYY', format: 'YYYY' }];*/
        categoryAxis.dateFormats = [{ period: 'fff', format: 'JJ:NN:SS' }, { period: 'ss', format: 'JJ:NN:SS' }, { period: 'mm', format: 'JJ:NN' }, { period: 'hh', format: 'JJ:NN' }, { period: 'DD', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'WW', format: 'MMM DD' }, { period: 'MM', format: 'MMM' }, { period: 'YYYY', format: 'YYYY' }];
        categoryAxis.axisColor = "#DADADA";
        categoryAxis.autoGridCount = false;
        categoryAxis.gridCount = 4;
        categoryAxis.markPeriodChange = false;

        var valueAxis = new AmCharts.ValueAxis();
        valueAxis.position = "right";
        FunsIndicesChart.addValueAxis(valueAxis);

        var graph = new AmCharts.AmGraph();
        graph.type = "line";
        graph.title = "Market";
        graph.valueField = "IndexVal";
        //graph.lineAlpha = 4;
        graph.lineColor = "#F58221";
        graph.yAxis = valueAxis;
        graph.lineThickness = 4;
        //graph.fillColors = ["#35628D", "#A7D2EE"];
        graph.fillColors = ["#F58221", "#FFF"];
        graph.fillAlphas = 1;
        graph.pointPosition = "start";
        graph.connect = true;
        graph.showBalloon = true;
        graph.borderThickness = 1;
        //graph.color = "#0000FF";
        graph.balloonText = "[[IndexVal]]";
        graph.balloonColor = "#F58221";
        graph.balloonFunction = function (graphDataItem, graph) {
            var color = "#0000FF"; // Text color
            return "<div style='color:" + color + "'>" + graphDataItem.values.value + "</div>";
        };
        FunsIndicesChart.addGraph(graph);



        //var tooltip = new am4core.Tooltip();
        //tooltip.style.display = "block";
        //tooltip.style.border = 0;
        //tooltip.style.background = "none";
        //tooltip.style.width = "200px";
        //tooltip.useHTML = true;
        //tooltip.shared = true;
        //tooltip.split = false;
        //tooltip.shadow = false;
        //tooltip.borderWidth = 0;
        //tooltip.hideDelay = 2000;
        //tooltip.backgroundColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.8)';

        var chartCursor = new AmCharts.ChartCursor();
        chartCursor.cursorPosition = "mouse";
        chartCursor.categoryBalloonDateFormat = "DD MMM YYYY";
        chartCursor.bulletsEnabled = true;
        chartCursor.bulletSize = 8;
        chartCursor.categoryBalloonEnabled = false;
        chartCursor.cursorAlpha = 1;
        chartCursor.valueBalloonsEnabled = true;
        /*chartCursor.valueBalloonsColor = "e0ecf3";*/
        /*chartCursor.valueLineBalloonEnabled = false;*/
        chartCursor.cursorColor = "#F58221";
        chartCursor.valueLineEnabled = true;


        FunsIndicesChart.addChartCursor(chartCursor);


        var legend = new AmCharts.AmLegend();
        legend.position = "top";
        legend.top = 1;
        legend.markerSize = 2;
        legend.labelText = "";
        legend.markerType = "none";
        legend.markerLabelGap = 0;
        legend.valueText = "Index Value: [[value]] | Date: [[category]]";
        legend.verticalGap = 0;
        FunsIndicesChart.addLegend(legend);
        FunsIndicesChart.write("chartDiv3");
        $("[href='https://www.amcharts.com/javascript-charts/']").attr("href", "https://www.argaamplus.com").html("").css("top", "0px");
        //SetChartTabActiveInActive(o, days);
    }
    var previousClickedElement = document.querySelector('.period_3.active');

    function DrawSelectedPeriodIndexChart(event, period) {

        //var activeLi = document.querySelector('#market-commodities-data li.active');
        //var indexingLogicID = activeLi.getAttribute('value');

        const RecentAvailableDate = FundsIndicesData1
            .filter(x => x.IndexingLogicID == 1)
            .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.ValueDate) - new Date(a.ValueDate))
            .map(x => x.ValueDate)
            .shift();

        const fromDate = new Date(RecentAvailableDate);
        const selectedIntervalDateRange = getPreviousDate(fromDate, period);

        var selectedIntervalDataList = FundsIndicesData1.filter((rec) => rec.ValueDate >= selectedIntervalDateRange && rec.IndexingLogicID == 1).sort(function (a, b) {
            return new Date(a.ValueDate) - new Date(b.ValueDate);
        }).map(function (x) {
            return x.IndexVal;
        });

        var selectedIntervalCurrentValue = selectedIntervalDataList[selectedIntervalDataList.length - 1];
        var selectedIntervalPreviousValue = selectedIntervalDataList[0];
        var selectedIntervalChange = (selectedIntervalCurrentValue - selectedIntervalPreviousValue) / selectedIntervalPreviousValue;
        var selectedIntervalChangePercentage = ((selectedIntervalCurrentValue - selectedIntervalPreviousValue) / selectedIntervalPreviousValue) * 100;
        var clsName = "";
        if (selectedIntervalChange > 0) {
            clsName = "green";
        }
        else if (selectedIntervalChange < 0) {
            clsName = "red";
        }

        $('#IndexCurrentValue_' + 1).text(Number(selectedIntervalCurrentValue.toFixed(2)).toLocaleString());
        $('#IndexChangeValue_' + 1).parent('span').removeClass().addClass(clsName);
        $('#IndexChangeValue_' + 1).text(formatValues(selectedIntervalChange, 0, 'change'));
        $('#IndexChangePercentageValue_' + 1).parent('span').removeClass().addClass(clsName);
        $('#IndexChangePercentageValue_' + 1).text(formatValues(selectedIntervalChangePercentage, 1, 'change'));

        const chartTab = document.querySelectorAll('#chrtTab');
        chartTab.forEach((li) => {
            li.classList.remove('active');
        });

        // Add the active class to the clicked <li> element

        if (previousClickedElement !== null) {
            previousClickedElement.classList.remove('active');
        }
        event.classList.add('active');
        previousClickedElement = event;
        DrawFundsIndicesChartData(period, 1);
    }
    function getPreviousDate(from, Difference) {
        let newDate = '';

        if (Difference === '1W') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
        } else if (Difference === '1M') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear(), from.getMonth() - 1, from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '2M') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear(), from.getMonth() - 2, from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '3M') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear(), from.getMonth() - 3, from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '6M') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear(), from.getMonth() - 6, from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '1Y') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear() - 1, from.getMonth(), from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '2Y') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear() - 2, from.getMonth(), from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '3Y') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear() - 3, from.getMonth(), from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '4Y') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear() - 4, from.getMonth(), from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === '5Y') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear() - 5, from.getMonth(), from.getDate() + 1);
        } else if (Difference === 'YTD') {
            newDate = new Date(from.getFullYear(), 0, 1);
        } else if (Difference === '-1') {
            newDate = '-1';
        } else {
            newDate = from;
        }

        if (newDate instanceof Date) {
            return newDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];
        } else {
            return newDate;
        }
    }
    function formatValues(value, isPercentage, period) {
        var ExactValue = value;
        if (period === 'YTD' || period === '3Y' || period === '5Y' || period === 'change') {
            value = Number(value).toFixed(2).toLocaleString();
        } else {
            value = Number(value.toPrecision(2)).toFixed(2).toLocaleString();
        }
        if (value == -0 && isPercentage) {
            return `(${Math.abs(value)}%)`;
        }
        else if (ExactValue < 0 && !isPercentage) {

            return `(${Math.abs(value).toFixed(2)})`;
        }
        else if (value > 0 && isPercentage) {
            return value.toString() + '%';

        }
        else if (ExactValue > 0 && !isPercentage) {
            return value.toString();

        }
        else if (value < 0 && !isPercentage) {
            return `(${Math.abs(value)})`;
        }
        else if (value < 0 && isPercentage) {
            return `(${Math.abs(value)}%)`;
        }

    }
</script>

<script>
    var _loading = "<div style='text-align:center;'><img src='/content/images/ajax-loading.svg' alt='ajax loading' /></div>";
    $(document).ready(function () {
        $("[rel-load-url]").each(function (i, e) {
            var _url = $(e).attr("rel-load-url");
            var _method = $(e).attr("rel-load-method");
            var _data = $(e).attr("rel-load-data");
            var _placeholder = $(e);
            //$(_placeholder).html(_loading);
            $.ajax({
                method: _method,
                url: _url,
                data: _data
            })
                .done(function (data) {
                    $(_placeholder).html(data);
                })
                .fail(function (jqXHR, textStatus) {
                    $(e).attr("error", textStatus);
                    $(_placeholder).html("");
                })
                .always(function () {
                    //$(e).html("");
                    $("#market_indicator_market_id_14").hide();
                });

        });

    });

    $(document).ajaxComplete(function () {
        $("#market_indicator_market_id_14").hide();
        $("#market_indicator_market_id_3").addClass("active");
    });
    $(document).ajaxStop(function () {
        $("#market_indicator_market_id_14").hide();
        $("#market_indicator_market_id_3").addClass("active");
    });
    function resizeIframe(iframeId) {
        var iframe = document.getElementById(iframeId);
        if (iframe) {
            iframe.style.height = iframe.contentWindow.document.body.scrollHeight + 'px';
        }
    }
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {
        var topArticles1, topArticles2, topArticles3;
        var topArts = 1;
        var artSize = 3;
        $('.conferhome__section .title_confer a').each(function () {
            if (topArts == 1) {
                topArticles1 = $(this);
            } else if (topArts == 2) {
                topArticles2 = $(this);
            } else if (topArts == 3) {
                topArticles3 = $(this);
            }
            if (topArts == artSize) {
                var textLenCont1 = topArticles1.text().length;
                var textLenCont2 = topArticles2.text().length;
                var textLenCont3 = topArticles3.text().length;
                if (textLenCont1 < 40 && textLenCont2 < 40 && textLenCont3 < 40) {
                    topArticles1.closest('.title_confer').addClass('one_line');
                    topArticles2.closest('.title_confer').addClass('one_line');
                    topArticles3.closest('.title_confer').addClass('one_line');
                }
            }
            topArts++;
        });
    });
</script>

        <script type="text/javascript">
                            function SetTimeZone() {
                                var tz_cookie = "TZ";
                                var dt = new Date();
                                var tz = dt.getTimezoneOffset();
                                if ($.cookie(tz_cookie) == undefined || $.cookie(tz_cookie) == "") {
                                    $.cookie(tz_cookie, tz, { expires: 7, path: '/' });
                                }
                            }

            function ChangeLanguage(languageShortCode) {
                                SaveLanguageCookie(languageShortCode);

                                if (languageShortCode == 'en') {
                                    var url = '/en';
                                    url = decodeHtmlEntities(url);
                                    window.location.href = url.replace(/&amp;/g, '&').replace("ar_desktop_header", "en_desktop_header");
                                }
                                else if (languageShortCode == 'ar') {
                                    var url = '/';
                                    window.location.href = url.replace(/&amp;/g, '&').replace("en_desktop_header", "ar_desktop_header");
                                }
            }

            // Function to decode HTML entities
            function decodeHtmlEntities(html) {
                var txt = document.createElement("textarea");
                txt.innerHTML = html;
                return txt.value;
            }

                            function SaveLanguageCookie(languageShortCode) {
                                if (languageShortCode != "") {
                                    //save the new language cookie
                                    $.cookie('Language', languageShortCode, { expires: 7, path: '/' });
                                }
                            }
                           function SaveMarketGPCookie() {
                               if ('false' == 'false') {
                                   $.cookie('MarketForGP', '3', { path: '/'});
                                      }
                                     }

                            $(document).ready(function () {
                                SetTimeZone();
                                SaveLanguageCookie('ar');
                                layoutLoadForWeb();
                                SaveMarketGPCookie();
                            });

        </script>

            <script>

                $(document).ready(function () {
                    $(".sponser_logo").each(function () {
                        $(this).click(function () {
                            window.open($(this).attr("relopenurl"));
                        });
                    });

                    if ($("#IsSpecialPoll").val() == undefined || $("#IsSpecialPoll").val() == "") {
                        loadStreamerComment();
                    }
                });
                /// local storage key fro comments count new logic
                if (!localStorage["greyColor"]) {
                    localStorage.setItem("greyColor", JSON.stringify([]));
                }
                function loadStreamerComment() {
                    var strValue = '';

                    $("[rel_count_rec]").each(function (i, e) {
                        strValue = strValue + $(e).attr("rel_count_rec") + ':' + $(e).attr("rel_type") + '|';
                    });
                    if (strValue == '')
                        return;
                    $.ajax({
                        type: "POST",
                        url: streamerApiURL + "/json/streamer-home/get-comments-count",
                        data: { Values: strValue },
                        success: function (data) {
                            var lcldta = getGreyData();
                            $(data.Data).each(function (i, r) {
                                if ($.isNumeric(r.CommentsCount) && parseInt(r.CommentsCount) != 0) {
                                    var clr = r.IsRedColor ? "red1" : "grey";
                                    if (lcldta.length > 0 && lcldta.filter((dta) => dta.Eid == r.EntityID && dta.Tid == r.ThreadID).length > 0) {
                                        clr = "grey";
                                    }
                                    var ele = $("[rel_count_rec='" + r.RecordID + "']")
                                    ele.attr("href", ele.attr("href") + "#" + r.ThreadID);
                                    //ele.parent().children("a").attr("href", "return addCmntColor(" + r.Eid + "," + r.ThreadID + "," + r.CreatedOn + ")")
                                    // var content = "<a href=" + ele.parent().children(" a").attr("href") + "#" + r.ThreadID + ">" + r.CommentsCount + "</a>";
                                    var border = "";
                                    if (ele.closest("ul").next("ul").find("li").length > 1) {
                                        border = "cmnt-border"
                                    }
                                    ele.html(r.CommentsCount).addClass("countview").addClass(clr).addClass(border);
                                    if (ele.parent().hasClass('icon')) {
                                        ele.parent().addClass("count_container " + clr);
                                    }
                                }
                            });
                        }
                    });
                }
                function getGreyData() {
                    var currentDate = new Date();
                    currentDate.setHours(currentDate.getHours() - 1);
                    var data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("greyColor"));
                    data = data.length > 0 ? data.filter(v => new Date(parseInt(v.dt.substr(6))) > currentDate) : data;
                    localStorage.setItem("greyColor", JSON.stringify(data));
                    return data;
                }
                //function addCmntColor(cmntFormat, thread,dt) {
                //    var data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("greyColor"));
                //    if (data.Efrmt.includes(format).length == 0)
                //        data.push({ Eid: cmntFormat, Tid: thread,dt:dt })
                //    localStorage.setItem("greyColor", JSON.stringify(data));
                //    return true;
                //}
            </script>

            <script>
        $(document).ready(function () {
